answers: System design = designing large-scale distributed systems. Architecture, databases, caching, load balancing, messaging.
Key concepts: horizontal scaling, load balancers, CDN, caching (Redis), database sharding, message queues, and microservices.
Interview approach: clarify requirements → estimate scale → design high-level → deep dive components → discuss tradeoffs.
Learn: System Design Primer (GitHub), Designing Data-Intensive Applications (book), and YouTube channels (Gaurav Sen, Alex Xu).
